description: P0-S3: Full orchestration cycle. Orchestrator spawns a worker child (with embedded childScript), waits for it, then exits. Tests spawn → wait → child completes → notification → orchestrator continues.

actions.message: Orchestrator waiting for worker child to complete...
Orchestrator received child completion, creating summary node.

actions.title: Orchestration Complete
actions.summary: Orchestrator successfully spawned worker, waited for completion, and reviewed results.
